authShell.subtitle: Local rental management
authShell.heroTitle: All your rental management in an interface that finally looks like a real application.
authShell.heroDesc: Centralize your leases, payments, deposits, reminders and fiscal exports in a local, readable environment that's quick to use every day.
authShell.featurePaymentsDesc: Monthly tracking, reminders and PDFs in a few clicks.
authShell.featureLeasesDesc: IRL, deadlines, security deposits and related documents.
authShell.featureLocalDesc: Desktop app for private landlords, no web space to maintain.

login.title: Access your control panel.
login.description: Sign in to your owner workspace with the same window controls as in the rest of the application.
login.localData: Data stored locally and encrypted on this machine.
login.lockout: Too many attempts. Try again in {{seconds}}s.

setup.title: Set up your owner workspace.
setup.description: Create your local account to get started with a more complete interface and consistent window controls.
setup.noServer: No external server. All data stays on this machine.
setup.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
setup.emailTaken: This email address is already used by another account. Case does not matter.
setup.accountCreated: Account created successfully. Sign in to access your owner workspace.

recovery.title: Reset password
recovery.descKey: Enter the recovery key provided when your account was created.
recovery.descNewPassword: Choose a new password for your account.
recovery.descDone: Your password has been reset. Write down your new recovery key.
recovery.keyNotShownAgain: This key will not be shown again after closing this window.
recovery.keepKeySafe: Keep it in a safe place to be able to reset your password in the future.
recovery.confirmSaved: I have saved my new recovery key in a safe place.
recovery.recoveryKeyDesc: Write down this key in a safe place. It is the only way to reset your password if you forget it.
recovery.regenNote: You can regenerate a new one from Settings, but you will need your current password.
recovery.confirmSavedSetup: I have saved my recovery key in a safe place.

activation.title: Activate your paid access.
activation.description: Enter the billing email and activation code you received after payment to unlock this installation.
activation.footer: The local token refreshes automatically every 24 hours when the network is available.

status.unlicensedTitle: No active license on this device
status.unlicensedDesc: Activate the app with the billing email from the purchase and the activation code sent after checkout.
status.activeDesc: This device is entitled. The local token will refresh automatically.
status.graceDesc: The last refresh failed, but access stays open until the offline grace window ends.
status.inactiveDesc: The server reported that this subscription is no longer active. Reactivate access or verify billing.
status.expiredDesc: This device could not refresh its license in time. Restore network access, retry refresh, or reactivate the app.

errors.licenseNotFound: License not found. Check the billing email and activation code.
errors.subscriptionInactive: The subscription attached to this license is inactive.
errors.network: The app could not reach the license service.
errors.timeout: The license service did not respond in time.
errors.tokenInvalid: The local token is invalid or corrupted. Reactivate the app.
errors.invalidResponse: The license service returned an incomplete response.
errors.notConfigured: This build is not configured to talk to the license API.

onboarding.title: Get started with Baillio
onboarding.createLeaseDesc: Link a property and a tenant.

properties.title: Properties
properties.emptyDesc: Add your first property to get started.
properties.name: Property name
properties.ownerDefaultHelp: This profile will be used automatically for new leases created from this property.

tenants.title: Tenants
tenants.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email or property...
tenants.emptyDesc: Add your first tenant to get started.
tenants.allDocumentsReceived: All core documents are marked as received.
tenants.fileAfterCreate: The guarantor, emergency contact and supporting documents can be filled in afterwards from the File button.

fileModal.guarantorDesc: Details about the guarantor or surety.
fileModal.emergencyContactDesc: Person to notify or contact again if needed.
fileModal.supportingDocumentsDesc: Tick the documents already received in the tenant file.
fileModal.notesDesc: Follow-up points, pending documents and free-form notes.
fileModal.notesPlaceholder: Details about the file, reminders for missing documents, observations...

ledgerModal.title: Tenant ledger
ledgerModal.noRowsDesc: The active lease needs a monthly rent amount to rebuild the tenant ledger.
ledgerModal.helpIntro: The ledger is rebuilt from the active lease and the payments recorded in the application.
ledgerModal.helpOutro: Periods without a payment line are marked for review.

leases.title: Leases
leases.emptyDesc: Create your first lease to link a property and a tenant.
leases.deleteDesc: This lease will be permanently deleted.
leases.deleteWarning: This action is permanent. Related payments and documents should already be handled.
leases.ownerProfileHelp: By default, the lease inherits the owner profile configured on the property.
leases.ownerDefaultNone: No default owner on this property
leases.irlWarning: No IRL index available. Import IRL data to enable revisions.
leases.irlStaleDesc: Add the latest published indices to keep revisions and IRL-based documents usable.
leases.revisionEligibleDesc: The anniversary date is approaching. You can revise the rent using the IRL index.

revisionModal.title: IRL rent revision
revisionModal.doneDesc: The new rent of {{amount}} has been applied.
revisionModal.missingReferenceQuarter: The reference IRL quarter is not defined for this lease.
revisionModal.missingReferenceValue: The reference IRL value is not defined for this lease.
revisionModal.missingNewIndex: No more recent IRL index is available for this quarter.
revisionModal.unavailableHelp: Edit the lease to define the reference IRL, or add a more recent IRL index.
revisionModal.formula: Formula: rent x (new IRL / reference IRL) = {{oldRent}} x ({{newIrl}} / {{referenceIrl}}) = {{newRent}} EUR

form.noProperties: No property available. Add a property first in Properties.
form.noTenants: No tenant available. Add a tenant first in Tenants.

errors.mobilityEndDateRequired: A mobility lease requires an end date.

payments.title: Payments
payments.deleteDesc: This payment will be permanently deleted.

form.notesPlaceholder: Example: partial payment, transfer received in two parts...

reminderModal.title: Unpaid reminder
reminderModal.help: The PDF generated here remains an amicable reminder. It does not replace a formal payment order served by a bailiff. If the payment is still pending, sending a reminder will automatically switch it to {{status}}.
reminderModal.emptyHistoryDesc: The first generated PDF will appear here with its date and notes.

relance_amiable.description: A first friendly reminder about the unpaid rent.

mise_en_demeure.description: A more formal request to settle the debt, still on an amicable basis.

proposition_echeancier.description: Suggest a payment plan to progressively clear the debt.

bankImport.title: Bank CSV import
bankImport.subtitle: Import bank credits and match them to payments.
bankImport.expectedColumns: Expected columns: date, label/description, amount or credit/debit.
bankImport.duplicateBanner: {{count}} transaction was already imported and ignored automatically. You can force it manually if needed.
bankImport.duplicateBanner_plural: {{count}} transactions were already imported and ignored automatically. You can force them manually if needed.
bankImport.invalidBanner: {{count}} selected row still needs to be completed before import.
bankImport.invalidBanner_plural: {{count}} selected rows still need to be completed before import.
bankImport.emptyDesc: Debit lines are ignored. Only incoming credits are proposed for matching.

errors.incompleteRows: Complete {{count}} row before confirming the import.
errors.incompleteRows_plural: Complete {{count}} rows before confirming the import.
errors.noValidRows: No valid row could be imported.
errors.missingDateColumn: Date column not found in the CSV.
errors.missingDescriptionColumn: Label/description column not found in the CSV.
errors.missingAmountColumn: Amount column not found in the CSV.

none.label: No match
none.detail: Amount and label do not match any payment or active lease.

row.newPaymentFor: New payment for {{tenant}} | {{amount}} expected on this lease.

errors.selectExistingPayment: Choose an existing payment to link.
errors.selectLease: Choose an active lease to create this payment.

documents.title: Documents
documents.emptyDesc: Generate your first documents from payments or leases.
documents.deleteDesc: This document will be permanently deleted.
documents.emptySourcesDesc: Templates become available once a payment is marked paid, a furnished lease is active, a lease can be revised, or a security deposit has been collected or returned.
documents.noMatchDesc: Try adjusting your filters or search.
documents.generateHelp: Open the template center to generate a rent receipt, revision notice, furnished lease contract or deposit document.

modal.title: Template center
modal.doneDesc: The PDF was saved and added to the document list.
modal.noTemplate: No template can be generated right now. Check that a payment is marked paid, that a lease can be revised, or that a furnished lease or security deposit is available.

payment_certificate.title: Receipt or payment receipt
payment_certificate.description: From a payment marked as paid.

rent_revision_notice.title: Rent revision notice
rent_revision_notice.description: Generated from the lease IRL reference.

furnished_lease_contract.title: Furnished lease contract
furnished_lease_contract.description: Official furnished lease template with additional fields.

errors.noTemplate: No template is available right now.
errors.fillRevisionDates: Enter the notice date and the effective date.
errors.missingRequiredMentions: The contract still has required fields to complete.

payment.fullDesc: Full payment: a rent receipt will be generated.
payment.partialDesc: Partial payment: a payment receipt will be generated.

revision.summary: The document will restate the IRL revision formula and notify a new monthly rent excl. charges of {{amount}} effective on {{date}}.

depositReceipt.summary: The PDF will confirm the collection of the security deposit planned in the lease dated {{date}}.

depositSettlement.summaryWithNotes: The recorded notes will be included in the document: {{notes}}
depositSettlement.summaryWithoutNotes: The document will mention that no additional note was recorded.

reminders.title: Deadline center
reminders.subtitle: Leases, reminders and deadlines to watch
reminders.emptyDesc: Your reminders and deadlines will appear here.
reminders.pendingDesc: Automatically derived reminders and manual reminders that are still open.
reminders.completedManualDesc: History of reminders that were closed or already handled.
reminders.noPendingDesc: Add a manual reminder or let the app flag lease endings and IRL revisions.
reminders.noCompletedDesc: Reminders you mark as done will appear here.

derived.leaseEndDesc: The lease is nearing its end date. Review renewal, move-out or notice steps.
derived.irlRevisionDesc: Lease anniversary date for a possible IRL revision.

inspections.title: Inspections
inspections.subtitle: Move-in and move-out inspections
inspections.noLeaseDesc: Create a lease first to record an inspection.
inspections.formSubtitle: Move-in or move-out inspection for a lease.
inspections.latestFoundTitle: Latest inspection found for this lease
inspections.roomsDesc: One line per room, area or notable fixture.
inspections.signatureHelp: The PDF uses the landlord signature if it exists in {{owner}}. The tenant signature remains a space to sign on the printed version.

errors.dateBeforeLeaseStart: The date cannot be earlier than the lease start date.
errors.addRoom: Add at least one area to describe.
errors.roomNameRequired: Each row must have an area name.

pdf.legalNote: Document generated via Baillio. This MVP version includes the landlord signature and a signature space for the tenant.

fiscal.title: Fiscal summary
fiscal.subtitle: Overview of your income and expenses
fiscal.incomeByPropertyDesc: Collected rents and charges, outstanding amounts and deductible expenses by property.
fiscal.noPropertiesDesc: Add at least one property and a lease to build an annual fiscal summary.
fiscal.noActivityDesc: The selected year has no lease coverage or matched payment for your properties.
fiscal.scopeLine1: Collected rents and charges only include payments with the paid status.
fiscal.scopeLine2: Outstanding amounts include pending and late entries for the selected year.
fiscal.scopeLine3: Deductible expenses are entered manually per property and per year.
fiscal.scopeLine4: Net result = total collected - total deductible expenses.
fiscal.notesLine1: The PDF and CSV are working documents for a private landlord, not an automatic tax filing.
fiscal.notesLine2: If your payment history is incomplete, collected totals and outstanding balances will stay partial.
fiscal.notesLine3: Remember to enter expenses for each property before exporting.
fiscal.expensesDesc: Property tax, works, landlord insurance, management fees, loan interest...
fiscal.label: Label
fiscal.noExpensesDesc: Add deductible expenses (property tax, works, insurance...) to calculate the net result.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account and preferences
settings.appearanceDesc: Choose how the application should look

updates.title: Updates
updates.desc: Check new versions, download the installer and restart to apply it.

disabledReason.notConfigured: Configure BAILLIO_UPDATE_URL at build time to enable built-in updates.
disabledReason.unsupportedPlatform: Built-in updates are currently supported on Windows only.
disabledReason.development: Updates are disabled by default in development mode.

updates.idleDesc: Run a manual check against the configured update channel.
updates.checkingDesc: The update server is being queried right now.
updates.downloadReady: The update has been downloaded. Restart to launch the installer.
updates.upToDateDesc: You are already running the latest published build.
updates.errorDesc: The last update check failed. Verify the source and try again.

license.title: License
license.desc: Local status of the paid entitlement on this device.
license.accessGranted: Access is currently granted on this device.
license.accessBlocked: Access is blocked until a valid license is available.

diagnostics.title: Diagnostics
diagnostics.desc: Export a minimal support snapshot without including the license token.
diagnostics.includesDesc: App version, license state, update state, backup settings, local paths, and the tail of the license log.

backup.title: Backup and restore
backup.desc: Protect your data by creating regular backups
backup.saveDesc: Exports the database and profile into a single archive.
backup.restoreDesc: A preview will be shown before restoring.
backup.restoreWarning: This will replace all data. The application will restart.
backup.verifyDesc: Check the integrity of a file without restoring it.
backup.dataFolderDesc: Open the directory containing the database and profile.

recoveryKey.title: Recovery key
recoveryKey.desc: Regenerate your key to reset the password if forgotten
recoveryKey.oldInvalid: The old key is no longer valid. Write down this new key in a safe place.
recoveryKey.notShownAgain: It will not be shown again after closing.
recoveryKey.regenWarning: Regeneration invalidates the old key. Only the latest key can reset your password.
recoveryKey.confirmSaved: I have saved my new recovery key in a safe place.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.deleteAccountDesc: Deletes your account and resets the application. Your rental data will not be erased.
danger.irreversible: This action is irreversible. Enter your password to confirm.

profile.title: Owner profile
profile.subtitle: Your personal information used in official documents
profile.infoDesc: Your name, address and phone number appear on rent receipts and documents generated by the application. Make sure this information is complete and up to date to ensure the legal compliance of your documents.
profile.signatureDesc: Your signature appears on generated official documents.
profile.ownersDesc: Choose which owner identity is currently used for generated documents.
profile.deleteOwnerError: Unable to delete this owner profile.
profile.createOwnerNotice: New owner profile created. Complete its details before generating documents.
profile.familySciHelp: Use this when the active owner is a family SCI.
profile.emailOptional: Email is optional for secondary owner profiles.
profile.primaryEmailHelp: The primary owner stays linked to sign-in. Keep a valid email here.
profile.requiredName: Enter an owner name before saving.
profile.requiredPrimaryEmail: The primary owner must keep an email address.
profile.ownerSaveError: Unable to save this owner profile.
profile.cannotDeletePrimary: The primary owner profile cannot be deleted.
profile.formDesc: This information is used on rent receipts and generated documents. The City field is used as the signing location on documents.
profile.fullNameHelp: Legal name as it appears on official documents.
profile.addressHelp: Full landlord address shown on receipts.
profile.cityHelp: Signing city shown on generated documents.
profile.signatureDrawHelp: Draw your signature below with the mouse or a stylus.

attachments.title: Attachments
attachments.emptyDesc: Click Add to attach a PDF file or an image.
attachments.previewUnavailable: Preview is not available for this file type.
